headline: Stock Market Awaits Iran War News After Big Losses. Why Oil Prices Could Go Much Higher.
summary: With the stock market reeling from crude oil's record week, investors await Iran war news, including any Trump moves.

headline: These Are The 5 Best Stocks To Buy And Watch Now
summary: Buying a stock is easy, but buying the right stock without a time-tested strategy is incredibly hard. So what are the best stocks to buy now or put on a watchlist?

headline: 2 Unpopular Stocks That Should Get More Attention and 1 We Ignore
summary: When Wall Street turns bearish on a stock, it’s worth paying attention. These calls stand out because analysts rarely issue grim ratings on companies for fear their firms will lose out in other business lines such as M&A advisory.
